livePrompt: The implementation is complete and its tests pass. Review the finished diff for correctness and tell me whether to merge it.
raw: {"schemaVersion":1,"kind":"plan_critique","phase":"plan","status":"wrong_phase","verdict":null,"feasibility":"Not reviewed after implementation.","frameMeta":"SKIP","summary":"Use the future implementation reviewer for completed code.","findings":[],"edgeCases":[],"actions":["Route this request to the implementation reviewer when available."]}
note: Real misuse class: feature critique was invoked after implementation and must decline without inventing a plan receipt.
Historical artifact-writing output is not the structured response and must never become eligible.
Historical compact-summary variants are deliberately unsupported.
Fenced JSON is not exact JSON and capture must not recover it heuristically.
Truncated provider output is retained as invalid evidence but never eligible.
The closed response schema prevents flow identifiers from silently returning.
